race.comment: SMOKIN' ROHIE (5) kept coming only to just miss last start over 2218m at Donald. The engagement of Luca Remondet is a positive move. Ready to go one better. SADLERS SYMPHONY (2) drifted well back last start then wound up strongly to finish fifth, beaten 1.75 lengths, over 2465m at Geelong. Watch for him to be charging home again. CHARTWELL HOUSE (3) has had his past three start over 1000m after running second over 2000m at Colac, but has trialled twice since and will give a sight. CIRCA (9) has a poor winning strike-rate but wasn't far off SMOKIN' ROHIE last start, so if you concede him a chance you've got to consider CIRCA. TURNTYNE (10) finished 4 lengths from the winner in fifth last start after being prominent at the bend over 2050m at Mornington, an improvement on his seventh at Wangaratta the run before. Likely improver with strong prospects.
